# Pure Bakes — Luxury Custom Cake Studio, Hyderabad

Pure Bakes is a luxury custom cake studio based in Hyderabad, India.
We specialise in handcrafted cakes for weddings, birthdays, engagements,
baby showers and corporate events. All cakes are available fully eggless.
FSSAI certified. Operating since 2016. 500+ cakes delivered.

## Services
- Wedding cakes Hyderabad
- Custom birthday cakes Hyderabad
- Eggless cakes Hyderabad
- Engagement cakes Hyderabad
- Baby shower cakes Hyderabad
- Baking classes Hyderabad
